query:
SELECT 'tutors_active' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM tutors WHERE active = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'tutors_total', COUNT(*) FROM tutors
UNION ALL SELECT 'nightly_email_queued', COUNT(*) FROM nightlyAgendaEmails WHERE status='queued'
UNION ALL SELECT 'nightly_email_sent', COUNT(*) FROM nightlyAgendaEmails WHERE status='sent'
UNION ALL SELECT 'plans_total', COUNT(*) FROM dailyPlans
UNION ALL SELECT 'plans_far_future_2027plus', COUNT(*) FROM dailyPlans WHERE date > '2026-12-31'
UNION ALL SELECT 'plans_templates', COUNT(*) FROM dailyPlans WHERE isTemplate = 1
UNION ALL SELECT 'blocks_total', COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks
UNION ALL SELECT 'blocks_orphan', COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks sb LEFT JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = sb.planId WHERE dp.id IS NULL;

UNION ALL SELECT 'nightly_email_queued', COUNT(*) FROM nightlyAgendaEmails WHERE status='queued'
UNION ALL SELECT 'nightly_email_sent', COUNT(*) FROM nightlyAgendaEmails WHERE status='sent'
UNION ALL SELECT 'plans_total', COUNT(*) FROM dailyPlans

UNION ALL SELECT 'blocks_total', COUNT(*) FROM scheduleBlocks
